Current asset component, but not the total.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

Component of current liabilities, not total.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet line for current financing debt; best match for short-term debt and cleaner than maturity supplement.
Supplemental maturity disclosure that also reflects current portion of long-term debt, but less preferred than the direct balance sheet line.

variables.notes: Chose a direct balance sheet short-term debt line outside the shortlist. Excluded lease liabilities and did not add LT Debt Maturing Within 1 Year to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

Gross PPE would be acceptable if total/net absent, but here it is not populated.
